goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:30' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 21:30 and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
